rulings.Case Title: DAVID GRASSI VS. BRAD E. WILLMORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security And For Prefling Order Prohibiting Vexatious Litigant From Filing New Litigation In Pro Per; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 16, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT BRADFORD WILLMORE'S Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Furnish Security And For Prefling Order Prohibiting Vexatious Litigant From Filing New Litigation In Pro Per is denied. While defendant has established that plaintiff is a vexatious litigant, defendant has failed to show that there is not a reasonable probability that plaintiff will prevail in this litigation. Any motion seeking to prohibit new filings by the plaintiff should be noticed before the Presiding Judge (CCP 391.7). =(302/DEW/AY)
